template.name: set-object-warzone
template.content: <use template="ts:condition-event"> <with id="#{id}"/> <with settedUpInit="#{settedUpInit}"/> <with param="conditions"> <conditions glue="#{glue}"> <#{not}> <inside objectId="#{objectId}" regionId="#{regionId}" objectPoint="#{objectPoint}"/> </#{not}> #{conditions} </conditions> </with> <with param="trigger"> #{trigger} <message text="#{message}"/> <success/> </with> </use>

template.name: set-robot-warzone
template.content: <use template="ts:set-object-warzone"> <with id="#{id}"/> <with regionId="#{regionId}"/> <with objectPoint="#{objectPoint}"/> <with message="#{message}"/> <with objectId="robot1"/> <with not="#{not}"/> <with glue="#{glue}"/> <with param="conditions"> #{conditions} </with> <with param="trigger"> #{trigger} </with> </use>

template.name: change-score-with-log
template.content: <use template="ts:condition-event"> <with id="#{id}"/> <with settedUpInit="#{settedUpInit}"/> <with param="trigger"> <setter name="#{scoreVariable}"> <#{operation} _1="${#{scoreVariable}}" _2="#{value}"/> </setter> <message text="#{message}"/> #{trigger} </with> <with param="conditions"> #{conditions} </with> </use>

template.name: object-region-with-score
template.content: <use template="ts:change-score-with-log"> <with id="#{id}"/> <with settedUpInit="#{settedUpInit}"/> <with operation="#{operation}"/> <with scoreVariable="#{scoreVariable}"/> <with value="#{value}"/> <with message="#{message}"/> <with param="trigger"> #{trigger} </with> <with param="conditions"> <conditions glue="#{glue}"> <#{not}> <inside objectId="#{objectId}" regionId="#{regionId}" objectPoint="#{objectPoint}"/> </#{not}> #{conditions} </conditions> </with> </use>

template.name: robot-stop-in-region-with-score
template.content: <use template="ts:object-region-with-score"> <with id="#{id}"/> <with settedUpInit="#{settedUpInit}"/> <with regionId="#{regionId}"/> <with objectPoint="#{objectPoint}"/> <with operation="#{operation}"/> <with not="#{not}"/> <with glue="#{glue}"/> <with scoreVariable="#{scoreVariable}"/> <with value="#{value}"/> <with message="#{message}"/> <with param="trigger"> #{trigger} </with> <with param="conditions"> <equals _1="${robot1.#{left}.power}" _2="0"/> <equals _1="${robot1.#{right}.power}" _2="0"/> #{conditions} </with> </use>

template.name: robot-finish-in-region-with-score
template.content: <use template="ts:robot-stop-in-region-with-score"> <with id="#{id}"/> <with settedUpInit="#{settedUpInit}"/> <with regionId="#{regionId}"/> <with objectPoint="#{objectPoint}"/> <with operation="#{operation}"/> <with not="#{not}"/> <with glue="#{glue}"/> <with scoreVariable="#{scoreVariable}"/> <with value="#{value}"/> <with message="#{message}"/> <with param="trigger"> #{trigger} <success/> </with> <with param="conditions"> #{conditions} </with> </use>

template.name: robot-start-with-score
template.content: <use template="ts:change-score-with-log"> <with id="#{id}"/> <with settedUpInit="#{settedUpInit}"/> <with operation="#{operation}"/> <with scoreVariable="#{scoreVariable}"/> <with value="#{value}"/> <with message="#{message}"/> <with param="trigger"> #{trigger} </with> <with param="conditions"> <conditions glue="#{glue1}"> <conditions glue="#{glue2}"> <notEquals _1="${robot1.#{left}.power}" _2="0"/> <notEquals _1="${robot1.#{right}.power}" _2="0"/> </conditions> #{conditions} </conditions> </with> </use>

template.name: robot-start
template.content: <use template="ts:condition-event"> <with id="#{id}"/> <with settedUpInit="#{settedUpInit}"/> <with param="trigger"> #{trigger} </with> <with param="conditions"> <conditions glue="#{glue}"> <notEquals _1="${robot1.#{left}.power}" _2="0"/> <notEquals _1="${robot1.#{right}.power}" _2="0"/> #{conditions} </conditions> </with> </use>

template.name: robot-stop
template.content: <use template="ts:condition-event"> <with id="#{id}"/> <with settedUpInit="#{settedUpInit}"/> <with param="trigger"> #{trigger} </with> <with param="conditions"> <conditions glue="#{glue}"> <equals _1="${robot1.#{left}.power}" _2="0"/> <equals _1="${robot1.#{right}.power}" _2="0"/> #{conditions} </conditions> </with> </use>
